basic_info.name: SUT-Crack
basic_info.description: Segmentation packaging of SUT-Crack based on the 130 original asphalt pavement images with pixel-level crack masks.

source_publication.title: SUT-Crack: A comprehensive dataset for pavement crack detection across all methods

imaging_setup.camera: Road-surface imaging setup from source dataset
imaging_setup.lighting_conditions: Includes varied lighting, shadows, and oil-stain conditions

annotation_schema.description: Pixel-wise crack mask annotations from the SUT-Crack source release.
